horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: There will be a rush of conversations, messages, and short-distance travel as Mars is moving through Gemini. An important phone call will change the direction of a pending plan. You will spend more time dealing with paperwork, emails, or official communications that cannot be delayed. You will also get an update from a sibling, relative or a friend. There will be short journeys, but there are changes for delays as well. You will also complete a writing, application, or documentation task that has been pending for several weeks. A delayed response will finally arrive and confirm an expected decision officially.

The newmoon of this week will rise in Cancer, so you can expect significant developments at home. A family discussion will lead to a final decision about household responsibilities. You will spend more time organizing your living space and dealing with repairs or maintenance work. News related to property, rent, or a residential matter will arrive unexpectedly. The newmoon indicates new developments so, you can expect new home related projects or some functions at home. An emotional conversation inside the family will clear up a recent misunderstanding. You will purchase something necessary for the home. By the end of the week, a domestic matter that has been pending will finally move forward without any further delays thereafter.

Venus, the planet for love and charm has entered the sign which it dislikes, it is the sixth house, so you will be forced to take up complex tasks. There will be some competitive events connected to work like tests, interviews and team review. If you work hard then you will get good reviews and appraisals, otherwise there will be a lot of workplace tension. This is also a very good phase for job seekers as there are chances to get a new job. For Aries Sun, Moon and rising natives will have minor health related concerns, and they will surely take care of their health.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: There will be increased activity around money, family responsibilities, and personal finances as Mars is moving through Gemini. You will make an important payment that has been pending for some time. A discussion about shared family expenses will become unavoidable. Unexpected expenses will be the part of this week, as Mars is the planet for financial liabilities. Please make sure you control your speech otherwise there will be issues wherever you go. This is not the time to start a new investment plan as you may get deceived by terms and conditions. Mercury is retrogression so, there are chances for technical glitches, communication issues and travel blocks.

The newmoon will rise in Cancer so the third house will get impacted by this. You will meet with siblings, friends or network circles, as they will start a new project. Travel related to work, documents, or family responsibilities will increase. You will complete paperwork that has remained unfinished for weeks. Several phone calls and messages will demand quick responses. An application, request, or agreement will move forward successfully. By the weekend, you will receive confirmation regarding a matter that has required repeated follow-up. A delayed reply will finally arrive and settle an ongoing concern.

Venus's transit is moving through the fifth house, and this is a very good transit. You will receive appreciation for a creative effort or personal project. Parents will spend additional time managing a child's activity, performance, or achievement. A social invitation will lead to an enjoyable experience and an important connection. Aries Sun, Moon or rising natives will get new creative project, or people will appreciate their talent. News related to an examination, competition, or performance will arrive. By the weekend, a personal relationship will take a clear step forward. A celebration will also take place unexpectedly soon.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: For Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs will be very active these days as Mars is moving through your sign. You will take charge of a situation that has been delayed for too long. The schedule will become busier, with several tasks requiring immediate attention. You will make an important decision about your personal goals, appearance, or daily routine. Others will expect quick responses and direct action from you. You will travel more than planned and accomplish more than expected. However, Mars can make you very aggressive, which can bring issues wherever you go, so you have to control your speech.

The newmoon will rise in the water sign, Cancer and this will kickstart new investment plans for the next six months. You will review your spending habits and make a major purchase decision. There will be new events at home like a family meeting or a real estate deal. New job opportunities or freelance projects can also come up. You will receive news regarding savings, investments, or a valuable possession. New family members can come in through child birth, or wedding as well in the next six months. An unexpected expense will require immediate attention but will be handled successfully. By the end of the week, a financial matter that has remained uncertain will finally reach a clear and satisfying conclusion. You will also finalize an important household budget plan.

This week will bring pleasant developments within the home and family environment. You will spend more time improving your living space and making decisions about comfort, decoration, or household purchases. A family gathering or private celebration can come up, and it will bring memorable moments. There will be some updates connected to property, rent, or a residential matter will arrive and plans will move forward. An important conversation with a parent or older family member will bring clarity and relief. Venus is a natural benefic, so you will have better environment at home, and you will be relaxed.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content:
This is the week to stay silent, and make some better plans for your personal life. You will spend more time working privately on an important task or project. Martian transit through the twelfth house will bring some emotional constraints. There will be some updates from the foreign lands, or about global ventures. You will reconnect with someone from the past through an unexpected conversation. Plans will change behind the scenes, forcing you to adjust your schedule. Mars will aspect the sixth house, so there are chances for some arguments at workplace, so you have to be patient. You will be also spending time in prayer and meditation too
Venus is moving through the earth sign of Virgo, so, this is going to be a very pleasant week despite the financial issues. You will reconnect with a sibling, relative, or old acquaintance through an unexpected message or meeting. There will be short trips which will make you happy, and it will bring a sense of relaxation. You will receive appreciation for your ideas, writing, or communication skills. Important phone calls and messages will arrive at the right time and help resolve a pending matter. Social invitations will increase, and one conversation will become particularly memorable.

The newmoon will rise in the water sign of Cancer, so your personal life will be very impactful. Your appearance, schedule, or personal plans will receive greater attention. Others will notice your confidence and involvement in key matters. You will initiate conversations that have been postponed for weeks. A new responsibility will arrive unexpectedly and demand immediate action. You will also reconnect with someone significant from your recent past. By the end of the week, you will feel that a major personal chapter has officially begun. The changes will become visible to everyone around you.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: This week will bring increased activity involving friends, professional networks, and long-term goals as Mars is moving through the eleventh house. You will reconnect with someone who can help you move an important plan forward. Group discussions and team activities will demand more of your time than expected. A pending payment, incentive, or financial gain will finally arrive. You will receive an invitation to attend a social or professional gathering where useful contacts will be made. A friend will share news that changes your immediate plans. This is the week to spend time in finding some ideal long-term projects, and they will surely bring long term profits.

The newmoon will rise in the water sign of Cancer, and that will bring the need of prayer and meditation. You will spend more time alone while dealing with important decisions behind the scenes. A delayed document, payment, or response will finally arrive and help clear a pending issue. You will reconnect with someone from the past through an unexpected message or meeting. Hidden information related to work or personal life will come to light. Expenses connected to travel, health, or personal obligations will require immediate attention. An ongoing matter that has caused uncertainty will begin moving toward a clear and final resolution.

This week will bring favourable developments involving money, family matters, and personal possessions. You will receive positive news regarding a payment, purchase, or financial arrangement. Venus is moving through the second house, as it is moving through Virgo, so your family environment will surely improve. There will be a lot of expenses, so you need to control that. An important discussion about finances will lead to a practical agreement. You will also receive appreciation for your efforts at work or within the family. By the end of the week, a financial matter that has caused uncertainty will settle, bringing relief and a stronger sense of security.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: For Virgo Sun, Moon and rising signs, Mars is moving through Gemini, which will clearly impact the tenth house of career, so this is a good time to set some career goals. You will spend extra time handling deadlines, approvals, or official matters. Recognition for your efforts will come through a visible achievement or completed project. Professional competition will increase, pushing you to act faster than usual. An important career matter that has been delayed will finally begin moving forward. Job seekers will have the closest opportunity to get a new job, or a freelance project. At the same time, you will be a bit aggressive but you should stay away from that.

The newmoon of July will rise in the water sign of Cancer, so you will have a lot of activity with friends and teammates. The newmoon indicates new beginnings, so you will get many opportunities to join a new team or start a new long-term plan as well. A group meeting, social gathering, or professional event will introduce you to new opportunities and useful contacts. Discussions about a shared project or financial matter will move forward quickly. You will receive news related to an expected payment, benefit, or reward. An old plan that was postponed will return and gain momentum.

Venus transit in your sign will make you very self-conscious, so every Virgo Sun, Moon and rising signs will be going for some personal refinement. You will receive compliments, appreciation, or recognition that boosts your confidence. A meeting or conversation will create a stronger personal connection with someone important. Single Virgo natives will have the closest opportunity to find someone special to start a new relationship. People will surely give you good feedback, but sometimes you can get fussy about someone's attitude towards you. You will get invites to join a new team.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: The weekly horoscope shows a lot of foreign contacts, global ventures and higher studies related projects. You will make important decisions regarding a journey, course, application, or official process. Discussions with teachers, advisors, or experienced individuals will become more frequent and require immediate action. A delayed document, approval, or legal matter will begin moving forward. Since Mercury is in retrogression, you have to be careful, as there are chances for technical glitches and travel blocks. You will spend time dealing with paperwork, registrations, or formal procedures. The ninth house indicates spirituality, so you will get opportunity for pilgrimages and attend some rituals.

The newmoon will rise in the water sign, so your tenth house will be active. A long-pending professional matter will finally begin moving forward. You will spend more time managing deadlines, official documents, or workplace expectations. News related to a promotion, recognition, or career transition will attract attention. Your efforts will become more visible to others, and discussions about your future direction will intensify. A significant professional chapter will begin taking shape during this period. The newmoon indicates new beginnings, and the impact of the newmoon will last for the next six months so job seekers will have bright opportunities to secure a new job.

Libra Sun, Moon and rising signs will have a lot of intuitions and dreams as Venus is moving through the twelfth house. This Venus will bring some updates from foreign lands, or about global ventures. A personal matter that has remained unresolved will begin to settle quietly. You will spend more time away from busy social situations and focus on completing unfinished tasks. Expenses related to comfort, travel, or personal needs will increase. An important detail that was previously hidden will come to your attention and change your perspective. A private decision will bring relief and help you close an emotionally significant chapter.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: This week will bring a series of financial and personal matters that can no longer be postponed. You will spend time dealing with bank-related issues, pending payments, taxes, insurance, or shared expenses. Mars is moving through the eighth house of in laws, so there are chances for some significant event in their life. Information that was previously unavailable will finally come to light and change your understanding of an ongoing situation. You will also handle important documents, approvals, or legal formalities. An unexpected expense will arise, but it will be managed quickly. You will try to restructure your loans, Tax, PF and insurance.

The newmoon of July will rise in the water sign of Cancer, and that will trigger the ninth house of foreign lands and spiritual matters. The impact of the newmoon will last for the next six months, so you will plan for a long trip. News from a university, institution, or government office will require immediate attention. Teachers, mentors and religious figures will be very active with you. Travel arrangements may be finalized after several delays. You will spend time dealing with documents, registrations, or approvals. A long-term goal will begin to take a more definite shape, and an opportunity connected to learning or travel will move forward.

New friends and team mates will come up during this week as Venus is moving through the earth sign of Virgi. This is a very beneficial transit, so you can expect some support from the friends and team mates. A friend will offer support, useful information, or an opportunity that benefits you directly. News related to a financial gain, reward, or expected benefit will arrive. Your social circle will expand, and a long-term plan will begin moving in the right direction. If you were trying to get a membership, this Venus transit can bring that. Additionally, there will be brain storming sessions, interaction with foreigners, and more activities with youngsters.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: Transit Mars is moving through the air sign of Gemini, so your relationship is of utmost importance. A conversation that has been avoided for some time will finally take place and lead to a clear decision. You will spend more time dealing with a spouse, partner, client, or business associate than usual. Mars is an aggressive planet, so you will be in an aggressive mode, if you don't keep in control there will be arguments in the relationships. The seventh house indicates foreign lands, so there are chances to get foreign collaborations too. Meetings, negotiations, and discussions will increase throughout the week. An important relationship matter that has remained uncertain will finally start moving in a definite direction.

The financial matters will be very prominent as the newmoon will rise in the water sign of Cancer. You will spend time dealing with bank transactions, taxes, insurance, loans, or other financial responsibilities that require immediate attention. A delayed payment, approval, or document will finally begin moving forward. An important conversation about money, property, or shared resources will lead to a clear decision. Information that was previously unavailable will come to light and change the way you approach an ongoing situation. You may have to be accountable for every penny you spend, otherwise you will have arguments with your spouse or business partner.

For Sagittarius Sun, Moon and rising signs, the tenth house of career will be giving better results as Venus is moving through the earth sign of Virgo. This Venus will surely bring some favour from the top leadership, but you should not misuse the opportunity. There will be many meetings, and the outcome will be good. Job seekers will get the closest chances to find a job, and those who looking for appraisals will get positive update. A colleague or senior person will offer valuable assistance. You may even get a new manager, or there are chances for you getting a new device.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: Transit Mars is moving through the air sign of Gemini, which will impact the sixth house of debts, diseases and enemies. Mars is in the sixth house is good as well as challenging, so you have to be very careful. You will be very religiously working to complete some of the hard tasks at work. Since Mercury is in retrogression, there will be communication issues and technical glitches. Martian transit will bring issues with coworkers, so you have to be careful with what you speak at workplace. You will also focus on health appointments, routines, or physical well-being. An ongoing work-related matter will finally begin moving in the right direction.

The newmoon of July will rise in Cancer for the next six months your relationship sector will be active. A conversation that has been pending for some time will finally take place and lead to a clear decision. You will spend more time dealing with a spouse, partner, client, or business associate, and their role in your life will become more significant. An agreement, contract, or commitment will move forward after a period of delay. A meeting will change the direction of an important relationship. Single Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising signs e. The impact of the newmoon will last for the next six months, so you will have a lot of opportunities to meet new people.

The planet for love and charm Venus is moving through Virgo and that will bring an optimistic nature. You will receive good news regarding a course, application, examination, or official process. A conversation with a teacher, mentor, advisor, or experienced person will prove helpful and encouraging. Travel plans that were uncertain will begin moving forward smoothly. You will spend time completing documents, registrations, or arrangements connected to future goals. An opportunity involving learning, publishing, or international matters will attract your attention. You may also reconnect with someone living far away. A long-term plan that has been delayed will finally show clear signs of progress.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: Martian transit through the fifth house will surely bring significant events regarding your creative activities. You will spend more time dealing with a child's needs, schedule, or important achievement. A conversation related to studies, exams, or a learning opportunity will require quick decisions. A creative project that has been delayed will suddenly move forward and demand your full attention. Please don’t take any risky ventures, as there are chances for significant losses. You will be taking part in social gatherings, entertainment events and business meets too, through that you will meet new people.

The newmoon will rise in Cancer, and that will bring new projects at work, as the newmoon indicates new beginnings. This newmoon will bring new tasks, and new colleagues as well. The impact of the newmoon will last for the next six months, and that will bring significant changes at work but the workplace can be a bit volatile. Please stay away from office politics and all unwanted talks at work. You will also pay closer attention to health matters, appointments, or lifestyle changes. An ongoing problem that has disrupted your routine will finally begin to settle and show visible improvement.

Venus, the planet for charm and happiness is moving through the eighth house, so your financial matters will surely improve, and that is a positive update. Venus will do well in the eighth house, so your physical and emotional issues will sure subside. A delayed payment, insurance matter, loan, or financial settlement will begin moving forward. Sudden expenses will come up so, please control your expenses. An emotional discussion will help clear up a misunderstanding that has been lingering for some time. You may also spend money on something necessary but worthwhile. A personal or financial matter that has caused uncertainty will finally show signs of resolution and bring a sense of relief.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting July 12
content: Household matters will demand immediate attention early in the week, as a conversation with a family member reshapes several plans. News concerning property, repairs, or maintenance will lead to quick decisions and unexpected expenses. Martian transit through the fourth house will bring important talks with parents. There will be frequent activity inside the home, with visitors, discussions, and changing schedules disrupting routines. Documents related to property, residence, or a vehicle will move forward after a delay. One domestic disagreement will create temporary tension before practical matters take priority again. A household purchase will also require budgeting. By the weekend, important family decisions will be finalized, pending household tasks will be completed, and attention will return to comfort, security, and home life.

The newmoon will rise in the fifth house, so there will be a lot of activity with your creative skills. A creative project will demand immediate attention and consume more time than expected. Invitations to a social gathering, celebration, or entertainment event will arrive in quick succession. Single Pisces natives will get attention from someone they like. An expense related to hobbies, recreation, or children will require adjustment of personal budgets. Parents will spend more time with children, as children will have new beginnings. By the weekend, emotions surrounding love, creativity, and family happiness will settle, bringing satisfaction and relief. A long-awaited response regarding a performance, competition, or application will finally arrive this week itself.

Venus is moving through Virgo, and the seventh house of relationship sector will be active for the next few more days. This transit has positive and negative side, so make sure you don’t have any superficial ideas about relationships. Venus will bring new people into your life, and make sure you don’t expect anything from them without proper understanding. Foreign collaborations, and long trips will be coming up, and get ready for that. Business owners will get new business ideas, and they will get new clients too. If you are going through a relationship issues, it can get aggravates as Venus in the seventh house can damage the seventh house.
